description_long: This object is a boxy, modern piece of furniture with a robust metal frame and cross-bracing on the sides and back, giving it an industrial aesthetic. The main body is upholstered in a textured, light beige fabric, with thick, rectangular cushions forming the seat, backrest, and armrests. The frame is constructed from matte gray metal, providing both structural support and a visual contrast to the soft fabric. The legs are straight and extend directly downward, elevating the object off the ground. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, and the design is minimalistic with no apparent openings or compartments. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, comfortable seating unit rather than a traditional filing cabinet.
description: A modern, boxy furniture piece with a gray metal frame and light beige fabric upholstery, featuring thick cushions and cross-braced sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cross-braced metal frame and thick armrest, with the textured fabric upholstery visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the backrest, the cross-bracing, and the uniform fabric covering.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same cross-braced frame and armrest detail.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the seat cushion, both armrests, and the backrest, emphasizing the inviting, padded design.
